_instructions: AtlasLens landing-page text. Fill in the fields below, save, and restart the app. Leave a field as "" (empty) to hide that section on the Introduction tab. This file is read once at startup; there is no in-app editor. The _instructions key is ignored by the app. Set "species" to your dataset's organism ("Homo sapiens", "Mus musculus", or "Danio rerio"; common names like "human", "mouse", "zebrafish" also work) so GO enrichment, Ensembl-to-symbol mapping, and Hallmark gene sets use the right annotations. Leave "species" as "" to auto-detect it from the gene names.
